datasets.name: kpi_summary
queryLines:
SELECT
                  COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS total_orders,
                  ROUND(SUM(total_amount), 0) AS total_revenue,
                  ROUND(AVG(total_amount), 2) AS avg_order_value,
                  COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS active_customers,
                  ROUND(SUM(total_amount) / COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id), 2) AS revenue_per_customer
                FROM megacorp.silver.orders
                WHERE _is_valid = true AND status = 'completed'

datasets.name: revenue_quarterly
queryLines:
SELECT
                  CONCAT(order_year, '-Q', order_quarter) AS quarter,
                  order_year,
                  order_quarter,
                  region,
                  SUM(total_revenue) AS revenue,
                  SUM(order_count) AS orders,
                  ROUND(SUM(total_revenue) / SUM(order_count), 2) AS avg_order_value
                FROM megacorp.gold.revenue_monthly
                GROUP BY order_year, order_quarter, region
                ORDER BY order_year, order_quarter

datasets.name: revenue_by_region
queryLines:
SELECT
                  region,
                  SUM(total_revenue) AS total_revenue,
                  SUM(order_count) AS total_orders,
                  SUM(unique_customers) AS unique_customers
                FROM megacorp.gold.revenue_monthly
                GROUP BY region
                ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

datasets.name: top_products
queryLines:
SELECT
                  product_name,
                  category,
                  total_revenue,
                  total_units_sold,
                  ROUND(margin_pct, 1) AS margin_pct,
                  revenue_rank
                FROM megacorp.gold.product_performance
                WHERE revenue_rank <= 15
                ORDER BY revenue_rank

datasets.name: customer_segments
queryLines:
SELECT
                  clv_segment,
                  COUNT(*) AS customer_count,
                  ROUND(AVG(lifetime_revenue), 0) AS avg_lifetime_revenue,
                  ROUND(AVG(total_orders), 1) AS avg_orders,
                  ROUND(AVG(avg_order_value), 0) AS avg_order_value
                FROM megacorp.gold.customer_lifetime_value
                GROUP BY clv_segment
                ORDER BY avg_lifetime_revenue DESC

datasets.name: equipment_health
queryLines:
SELECT
                  equipment_id,
                  location,
                  sensor_type,
                  reading_date,
                  anomaly_rate,
                  avg_value,
                  avg_battery,
                  health_status
                FROM megacorp.gold.equipment_health_daily
                WHERE reading_date >= DATEADD(DAY, -30, CURRENT_DATE())
                ORDER BY anomaly_rate DESC
                LIMIT 100

datasets.name: equipment_summary
queryLines:
SELECT
                  health_status,
                  COUNT(DISTINCT equipment_id) AS equipment_count,
                  ROUND(AVG(anomaly_rate), 2) AS avg_anomaly_rate
                FROM megacorp.gold.equipment_health_daily
                WHERE reading_date >= DATEADD(DAY, -7, CURRENT_DATE())
                GROUP BY health_status

datasets.name: critical_equipment
queryLines:
SELECT
                  equipment_id,
                  location,
                  COUNT(*) AS critical_days,
                  ROUND(AVG(anomaly_rate), 2) AS avg_anomaly_rate,
                  MAX(reading_date) AS last_critical_date
                FROM megacorp.gold.equipment_health_daily
                WHERE health_status = 'CRITICAL'
                GROUP BY equipment_id, location
                ORDER BY critical_days DESC
                LIMIT 20

datasets.name: funnel_by_device
queryLines:
SELECT
                  device,
                  SUM(total_sessions) AS sessions,
                  SUM(product_views) AS product_views,
                  SUM(cart_sessions) AS cart_sessions,
                  SUM(checkout_sessions) AS checkout_sessions,
                  SUM(purchase_sessions) AS purchases,
                  ROUND(SUM(purchase_sessions) / SUM(total_sessions) * 100, 2) AS conversion_rate_pct
                FROM megacorp.gold.conversion_funnel_daily
                GROUP BY device
                ORDER BY sessions DESC

datasets.name: funnel_daily
queryLines:
SELECT
                  event_date,
                  SUM(total_sessions) AS sessions,
                  SUM(purchase_sessions) AS purchases,
                  ROUND(SUM(purchase_sessions) / SUM(total_sessions) * 100, 2) AS conversion_rate
                FROM megacorp.gold.conversion_funnel_daily
                GROUP BY event_date
                ORDER BY event_date

datasets.name: funnel_by_country
queryLines:
SELECT
                  country,
                  SUM(total_sessions) AS sessions,
                  SUM(purchase_sessions) AS purchases,
                  ROUND(SUM(purchase_sessions) / SUM(total_sessions) * 100, 2) AS conversion_rate
                FROM megacorp.gold.conversion_funnel_daily
                GROUP BY country
                ORDER BY sessions DESC

datasets.name: data_freshness
queryLines:
SELECT 'Bronze - Orders' AS layer, MAX(_ingested_at) AS last_refresh FROM megacorp.bronze.raw_orders
                UNION ALL SELECT 'Bronze - Clickstream', MAX(_ingested_at) FROM megacorp.bronze.raw_clickstream
                UNION ALL SELECT 'Bronze - Sensors', MAX(_ingested_at) FROM megacorp.bronze.raw_sensor_readings
                UNION ALL SELECT 'Silver - Orders', MAX(_silver_processed_at) FROM megacorp.silver.orders
                UNION ALL SELECT 'Silver - Sensors', MAX(_silver_processed_at) FROM megacorp.silver.sensor_readings
                UNION ALL SELECT 'Gold - Revenue', MAX(_gold_processed_at) FROM megacorp.gold.revenue_monthly
                UNION ALL SELECT 'Gold - Equipment', MAX(_gold_processed_at) FROM megacorp.gold.equipment_health_daily
                ORDER BY last_refresh DESC

datasets.name: inventory_alerts
queryLines:
SELECT
                  p.product_id,
                  p.product_name,
                  p.category,
                  p.stock_quantity,
                  p.reorder_point,
                  p.warehouse,
                  pp.total_revenue,
                  CASE
                    WHEN p.stock_quantity = 0 THEN 'OUT OF STOCK'
                    WHEN p.stock_quantity < p.reorder_point * 0.5 THEN 'CRITICAL'
                    ELSE 'LOW'
                  END AS urgency
                FROM megacorp.silver.products p
                LEFT JOIN megacorp.gold.product_performance pp ON p.product_id = pp.product_id
                WHERE p.needs_reorder = true AND p.status = 'active'
                ORDER BY pp.total_revenue DESC NULLS LAST
